name: com.blackwalltier/blackwall
description: Pre-action risk gate: AI agents call before any irreversible action (money, SQL, delete).

environmentVariables.name: BLACKWALL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your BLACK_WALL API key (bw_live_…) from https://blackwalltier.com/dashboard/keys

environmentVariables.name: BLACKWALL_MODE
environmentVariables.description: observe (log only, never block) or enforce (default).
